flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at University of San Diego rose 15% between 2007 and 2010 ($32.6k → $37.4k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at University of San Diego rose 13% between 2021 and 2024 ($52.9k → $59.5k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at University of San Diego fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (0.5% → 0.0%).
